name: intake-output-chart
title: Intake / Output Chart
description: Fluid balance by period — intake up, output down, running balance over the top — with incomplete output charting shown rather than absorbed.

props.name: data
props.description: `{ period, intake, output, outputIncomplete? }`. Output is passed as a positive number; the chart plots it downward.

clinicalNotes: The balance is only as complete as the charting behind it, so `outputIncomplete` is a first-class part of the data rather than a footnote. Where it is set, the output bar is drawn hollow and the net balance is badged unreliable: unrecorded output is not zero output, and a patient who appears two litres positive because nobody emptied the catheter bag is a patient about to receive a diuretic they do not need. A hollow bar exists precisely because a short solid bar meaning "not charted" and a short solid bar meaning "little passed" are the same picture. The running balance is a straightforward sum of what was charted — it is not a fluid-status assessment.
